reviews.text:
If you’re dreaming of getting married in beautiful Telluride, Colorado, look no further than K2 Event Co. for your planning team! K2 went above and beyond for our September 2025 wedding. We are a local couple and wanted a tented celebration on Last Dollar Road with just under 200 guests, a major undertaking that K2 made feel completely effortless!

Throughout our year of planning, Kristen and her team scheduled thoughtful meetings, offered incredible ideas, coordinated with vendors to secure the best options, and provided a calming, confident presence every step of the way. I always left our meetings feeling excited, assured, and at peace knowing our wedding would truly be the happiest day of our lives.

In the month leading up to the big day, K2 handled every detail, call, and site visit with care. Thanks to them, we felt so organized and relaxed. Our guests received clear guidance on travel and packing, and the team even offered to help with any questions from those new to Telluride. Annie was incredible throughout the process and always responded so quickly, which my mom especially appreciated! Trisha worked with my mother-in-law to plan a flawless rehearsal dinner, and on the wedding day itself, Delaney arrived bright and early with breakfast for the ladies and the most cheerful energy. Kate was by my side all afternoon, keeping me hydrated and calm, she even placed my veil just before I walked down the aisle! When a quick rain shower passed through as guests arrived, I started to worry, but the clouds cleared and a rainbow appeared just before my Dad and I walked to the altar. I’m still not sure how K2 made that happen! Kristen and her team truly felt like fairy godmothers on our magical day.

If you’ve said “yes” to the partner of your dreams and want a wedding your family and friends will rave about for years to come, K2 is the team for you!

K2 was absolutely essential for my wedding planning experience.  Kristen and Annie were literal angels. They helped me plan our wedding and rehearsal dinner/welcome party. Our wedding was the most perfect, beautiful, magical day of our lives and everything went off without a hitch! I couldn't be more grateful.

Unfortunately, some wires got crossed at some point while planning our welcome party. I had given K2 the creative freedom to plan the rehearsal dinner and welcome party because I trusted that they would execute my vision. I realized about 2 weeks before the wedding that our welcome party was not fully planned yet and the only thing we had figured out was the venue and food/drinks. I reached out to try to have some questions answered, and they were brushed off. I reached out again, and Kristen immediately called me. She apologized profusely about the mix up and told me that she would handle everything. On the day of the rehearsal dinner/welcome party everything was figured out at no extra charge and it was the most gorgeous day/weekend!

Side note: Annie went above and beyond to help me with so many little details and small things that she absolutely did not have any obligation to. As a younger and less demanding bride, I felt that sometimes with different vendors, people didn't always give me the attention I deserved. She really made me feel so seen and like everything I had to say was important. Annie is an absolute star! That girl should get a raise!

Sometimes mistakes happen, but ultimately K2 did an absolutely wonderful job planning our perfect dream wedding!

Kristen, Trisha, and the K2 team have absolutely everything you could want in a wedding planner. They are professional, communicative, creative, and incredibly authentic. Their knowledge of the venues and relationship with vendors is invaluable. Kristen took the time to understand our vision and needs and completely exceeded our expectations in every way. She has a quiet strength that keeps everything light and calm while ensuring every detail is taken care of.

As incredible as a planner as Kristen is, she is an even more wonderful human. My father was diagnosed with terminal brain cancer a few months before our wedding and Kristen called me willing to move the entire wedding up as soon as we needed if it meant he could attend. Even with our originally scheduled date, she made sure that she and her team did everything in their power to make him (and me) as comfortable as possible. It is safe to say that I could not have made it through this day without her support, confidence, and genuine light. We had a perfect day that my family and I will cherish forever. I truly cannot say enough amazing things about this team and cannot recommend them highly enough. Do not look any further for planning needs.

We used K2 as our “day of planner” to help building a timeline, giving recommendations for the Telluride area,  and then day of execution. We did not do a traditional wedding and didn’t have much time to see the area, so K2 was willing to make a custom quote for the help we needed. Kristen was such a pleasure to work with and made us feel so special throughout the process. Absolutely loved working with her and her team and would recommend to anyone looking to get married in the telluride area.

If you are planning a wedding near Telluride, CO we would HIGHLY recommend using Kristen at K2 Event Co.   We live almost 1,000 miles away and decided to have our wedding at San Sophia Overlook sight unseen.   After being led to Kristen, she instantly made our worries disappear.   She planned and coordinated everything with us over the phone and we could not have been happier with the results.

Kristen’s professionalism was remarkable. After telling her our requests she matched us with the perfect vendors and again took care of every detail.

Kristen’s sweet spirit is truly priceless.  She sent encouraging texts periodically.  On our wedding day we woke up to a “Happy Wedding Day” text  and another a few weeks later when we returned home making sure we made it safely.  She even offered to give one of our guests a ride to the venue that we thought might be unable to make the walk from the gondola to the wedding.

We were concerned about possibly having to reschedule our wedding due to the pandemic,  but Kristen maneuvered things around and made it happen on the day we originally planned.  Our day was perfect from start to finish and could not have been more beautiful.
